The primary endpoint was tested per protocol Section 12.4 at prespecified H0: mean maximum CRP decline = 0 versus H1: mean decline > 0 (one-sided), with α = 0.025 after Bonferroni adjustment for two planned Cohort 1 tests; only the low-dose one-sample test was performed because the high-dose arm did not enroll. `r evaluable_efficacy_n` of `r planned_evaluable_n` planned evaluable patients were analyzed; post-hoc power to detect the observed effect at α = 0.025 was approximately `r fmt_num(posthoc_power_pct, 0)`% (protocol design target: 80% power at 15 evaluable patients).
